debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
inst✝ : DecidableEq α
M : Matroid α
hM : M.IsRegular
hM' : M.RankFinite
⊢ M.IsGood

failed_attempts:
induction hM' using Matroid.RankFinite.induction_on_minor with M hM' IH
  obtain h | ⟨M1, M2, hS⟩ := hM.isElementary_or_exists_isSum
  · exact h.isGood
  · exact hS.isGood (IH M1 hS.minor_left (hM.minor hS.minor_left)) (IH M2 hS.minor_right (hM.minor hS.minor_right))

induction hM' using Matroid.RankFinite.induction_on_size generalizing M
  obtain h | h | h | ⟨M₁, M₂, h_sum, h₁, h₂⟩ := hM.exists_isGraphic_or_isCographic_or_isR10_or_isSum hM'
  · exact .graphic h
  · exact .cographic h
  · exact .R10 h
  · exact .sum h_sum (ih M₁ h₁ (h_sum.isRegular_left hM)) (ih M₂ h₂ (h_sum.isRegular_right hM))

induction hM' using Matroid.RankFinite.induction_on_card generalizing hM with M hM' IH
  rcases hM.exists_graphic_or_cographic_or_r10_or_sum hM' with (h | h | h | ⟨M1, M2, hsum⟩)
  · exact .graphic h
  · exact .cographic h
  · exact .r10 h
  · exact .sum hsum (IH M1 _ (hsum.card_lt_left hM') (hsum.isRegular_left hM))
      (IH M2 _ (hsum.card_lt_right hM') (hsum.isRegular_right hM))

induction hM' using Matroid.RankFinite.induction_on with
  | hM' ih =>
    obtain h | h | h | ⟨M1, M2, h_split, h1, h2⟩ := hM.exists_isGood_split
    · exact .graphic h
    · exact .cographic h
    · exact .R10 h
    · exact .split (h1 ih) (h2 ih) h_split

induction' hM' using Matroid.RankFinite.ncard_induction with M ih generalizing α
  rcases hM.exists_basic_or_split hM' with hB | ⟨M₁, M₂, hS, h1, h2⟩
  · exact .of_basic hB
  · exact .of_split hS (ih M₁ h1 (hM.isRegular_of_split hS).1) (ih M₂ h2 (hM.isRegular_of_split hS).2)

induction hM' using Matroid.RankFinite.induction_on_size with M hM' ih
  rcases hM.isGood_or_exists_sum_decomposition hM' with (h | ⟨M1, M2, hsum, hM1, hM2⟩)
  · exact h
  · exact IsGood.sum hsum (ih M1 (hsum.rankFinite_left hM') (hsum.size_lt_left hM') hM1)
      (ih M2 (hsum.rankFinite_right hM') (hsum.size_lt_right hM') hM2)

induction hM' using RankFinite.induction_on_card with M hM' ih
  obtain h | h | h | ⟨M₁, M₂, k, hk, h_sum, hM₁, hM₂, h₁, h₂⟩ := hM.exists_sum_decomposition hM'
  · exact .graphic h
  · exact .cographic h
  · exact .r10 h
  · exact .sum hk h_sum (ih M₁ h₁ hM₁) (ih M₂ h₂ hM₂)

induction hM' using Matroid.RankFinite.induction generalizing α M
  obtain hG | hC | hR | ⟨M₁, M₂, hS⟩ := hM.exists_graphic_or_cographic_or_R10_or_sum ‹_›
  · exact .graphic hG
  · exact .cographic hC
  · exact .r10 hR
  · obtain ⟨h1, h2⟩ := hS.isRegular_iff.1 hM
    exact .sum hS (ih M₁ hS.rank_lt₁ h1) (ih M₂ hS.rank_lt₂ h2)

induction hM' using Matroid.RankFinite.induction_on_connectivity with
  | h_3 hM' h3 => exact hM.isGood_of_is3Connected h3 hM'
  | h_sum hM' hS ih1 ih2 => exact hM.isGood_of_sum hS (ih1 hM.isRegular_left) (ih2 hM.isRegular_right)

induction' hM' using Matroid.RankFinite.induction_on_size generalizing hM with M hM' IH
  rcases hM.exists_isGraphic_or_isCographic_or_isR10_or_isSum hM' with (h | h | h | ⟨M₁, M₂, h_sum, h₁, h₂⟩)
  · exact .graphic h
  · exact .cographic h
  · exact .r10 h
  · exact .sum h_sum (IH _ h₁ (h_sum.isRegular_left hM)) (IH _ h₂ (h_sum.isRegular_right hM))

induction' hM' using Matroid.RankFinite.induction_on_smaller M generalizing hM with M hM' ih
  obtain h | h := hM.exists_is3Connected_or_isSum hM'
  · exact h.isGood_of_isRegular hM
  · exact h.isGood_of_isRegular hM ih

induction' hM' using Matroid.RankFinite.induction_on_ncard generalizing α M
  rcases hM.eq_isGraphic_or_isCographic_or_isR10_or_exists_split with (h | h | h | ⟨α₁, _, M₁, α₂, _, M₂, h⟩)
  · exact .of_isGraphic h
  · exact .of_isCographic h
  · exact .of_isR10 h
  · exact .of_split h (ih α₁ M₁ h.hM1_rankFinite h.ncard_lt_M.1 h.hM1_isRegular)
      (ih α₂ M₂ h.hM2_rankFinite h.ncard_lt_M.2 h.hM2_isRegular)
